tools.name: media_generate_image
tools.description: Generate or edit images using AI. Supports text-to-image generation and image editing with source images.

prompt.description: A text description of the image to generate or the edits to apply

mode.description: Whether to generate a new image or edit an existing one (default: generate)

source_paths.description: File paths to source images in the workspace (for edit mode)

model.description: Model tier alias (fast | quality | openai) or a concrete model ID. If omitted, uses the user's configured preference. Unknown values return an error listing currently available models.

variants.description: Number of image variants to generate (1-4, default: 1)
